info.title: Oviond Backend API
info.description: Authentication, account management, billing, and media services for Oviond.

onboarded.description: true if this call created the account; false if the user was already onboarded

avatar_url.description: Optional starting avatar URL; defaults to a placeholder the user can replace.

template_id.description: Clone pages and widgets from this template into the new project

source_id.description: Project id to add the asset widgets to

page_id.description: Page id to place the widgets on

client_id.description: Client id the project belongs to — drives the connectivity → demo decision. Falls back to the project's client when omitted.

type.description: Defaults to the source project's type when omitted

parent_id.description: Project ID this automation belongs to

template_id.description: Saved email template id, or the literal "custom" to use the inline payload

custom.description: Required when template_id === "custom" — inline subject + message

post.description: Single-call onboarding: creates accounts, users, branding, theme, first client, first project (all in one transaction-like sequence). Idempotent — if the caller is already onboarded, returns their existing ids.

get.description: Get the currently authenticated user profile.

put.description: Update the current user profile name, language, and theme.
Update the current user profile picture.
Change the current user email address.

get.description: List all team members for the authenticated account.

post.description: Invite a new user to the account.

put.description: Edit a team member (role, assigned clients, name).

403.description: Cannot edit a user from a different account

delete.description: Remove a team member from the account.

403.description: Cannot remove owner or user from a different account

post.description: Called by the frontend after a freshly-invited user completes Supabase Auth callback. Notifies the inviter.

get.description: Get the accounts row for the current account

delete.description: Irreversible. Cancels the active Stripe subscription, deletes all data across every table for this account, removes all team members from the users table, purges all S3 media files, and deletes all Supabase Auth users. Requires the account owner's current password as a confirmation gate.

get.description: Get account usage statistics vs plan limits
Cross-tenant list of non-staff users, each joined to its account billing summary. Search by email, paginated.

post.description: Sets the calling staff user's account_id to the target account (legacy 'switch account'). Captures the real home account so it can be restored. Busts the auth profile cache so the switch is immediate.
Sets the staff user's account_id back to null.

put.description: Update a user's email in Supabase Auth and the users table; marks email unverified.

post.description: Pushes end_period + trial_end_date out 14 days and sets subscription_status active (legacy extendTrial).

delete.description: Removes a user. If they are the last non-staff member of their account, the whole account is cascade-deleted (legacy deleteUser).
Irreversibly deletes an account and all its data (legacy deleteAccount). Cancels Stripe, purges S3 media, deletes Auth users, cascades all tables.

get.description: List staff members (role = guru), paginated.

post.description: Creates a Supabase Auth user, fires the invite email (redirect to the admin app), and inserts a users row with role = guru.

delete.description: Removes a staff member (role = guru) and their Supabase Auth identity. Cannot remove yourself.

get.description: Get company settings for the current account
List custom domains for the current account.

post.description: Add a custom domain. Detects the DNS provider and registers the domain on Vercel.

delete.description: Remove a custom domain.

get.description: Check domain verification status via Vercel.

post.description: Mark a custom domain as the account default for shared URLs (when a client has no domain override), or clear the default. Only an active domain can be set.

get.description: Get branding settings
List clients for the current account

post.description: Create a new client

get.description: Count total clients for the current account
List all clients with optional field selection

delete.description: Delete multiple clients by ID

patch.description: Apply the same partial patch to many clients in one call.

get.description: Get a single client by ID

delete.description: Delete a client and all its associated projects and widgets

post.description: Re-fetches the screenshot synchronously using the client's stored website and returns the new URL. Use this for user-triggered refresh on the dashboard card.

put.description: Move a client to one or more folders

get.description: List datasources connected to a client
List all client folders for the current account

post.description: Create a new client folder

delete.description: Delete a client folder and unassign all clients from it

get.description: List projects for the current account (optionally filtered by client).

post.description: Create a new project.

get.description: List all projects (id + name only) for dropdown selectors.

delete.description: Delete multiple projects by ID.

403.description: One or more projects do not belong to this account

get.description: Get a single project by ID.

delete.description: Delete a project and all its widgets.

post.description: Duplicate a project — deep copy of pages, widgets, and settings.

Re-fetch DATA widgets on the project with their current config and the project date range. Optional `datasource_id` body scopes the refresh to widgets fed by that one source (direct + dependent goals / calc-metrics). Fire-and-forget — results broadcast via Realtime.

get.description: List version history for a project, ordered by updated_at descending. Every save is an auto-save; rows with is_autosave=false are versions the user has labelled. Snapshot blob is omitted from the list response — fetch a single version for the full snapshot.
Get a single project version including the full snapshot. Used for preview before restore.

patch.description: Pin/unpin or rename a version. Both fields are independent: pin without renaming, rename without pinning, or both. Pinned rows survive the daily prune cron.

delete.description: Delete a pinned version. Unpinned rows age out via the daily prune cron and cannot be deleted directly through the API.

post.description: Restore a project to the state in the given version. Creates a backup version of the current state first (so the restore is itself reversible), then overwrites live pages/widgets/projects from the snapshot, and sets editing=true so the user lands in edit mode.

get.description: List pages for a project or template.

post.description: Create a page on a project or template.

delete.description: Delete a page.

get.description: Search clients, projects, users, automations, API keys, email addresses, email templates, email domains and custom domains (powers the command palette).

200.description: Search results across clients and projects

get.description: List widgets for a source.

post.description: Batch create widgets via upsert.

get.description: Get a single widget by ID.

delete.description: Delete a single widget by ID.

patch.description: Apply per-widget partial updates in a single call.

delete.description: Delete multiple widgets by ID.

patch.description: Apply a different patch to each of N widgets in one request.

post.description: Copy widget rows by id, including persisted series data, into new rows with caller-provided new ids.

404.description: One or more sources not found

post.description: Authoritative per-widget refresh: connected → real series, not connected → demo, static/non-datasource → skipped.
Proxy a datasource data query to data.oviond.com
Proxy a datasource connection test to data.oviond.com
Proxy a datasource accounts listing to data.oviond.com
Proxy a resource data fetch (campaigns, videos, etc.) to data.oviond.com

get.description: List all calculated metrics for the current account

post.description: Create a new calculated metric

delete.description: Delete a calculated metric

post.description: Duplicate a calculated metric

get.description: List all goals for the current account, optionally filtered by client_id

post.description: Create a new goal

delete.description: Delete a goal

post.description: Duplicate a goal

get.description: List all saved metrics for the current account.

post.description: Create a new saved metric.

delete.description: Delete a saved metric.

post.description: Clone a saved metric.

get.description: List custom datasets for the current account (no raw_data)

post.description: Create a new custom dataset (max 10,000 rows)

get.description: Get a single custom dataset by ID (includes raw_data)

delete.description: Delete a custom dataset

post.description: Duplicate a custom dataset

get.description: Get the billing row for the current account
List available subscription plans from Stripe
List Stripe invoices for a customer
List all OAuth data sources stored for the current account

put.description: Rename a data source auth entry

delete.description: Delete a data source auth entry

post.description: Link a datasource to a client
Unlink a datasource from a client
Test whether a stored auth connection is valid

get.description: List all auth profiles for every data source
List auth profiles for a specific data source

delete.description: Delete an auth connection

get.description: Return the active email transport for the account.

put.description: Switch the active email transport. Requires the chosen transport to already be configured.

get.description: Return the account's email sending domain (with current verification status), or null.

post.description: Register a sending domain with Resend.

delete.description: Remove the domain from Resend and the account.

post.description: Checks the domain. Fetches the current verification status: if the domain is already verified, the stored record is updated to verified and returned immediately. If not, verification is started and the current (unverified) record is returned — the status then updates on the next check or automatically in the background.

200.description: Returns the domain row. Already verified → updated to verified; otherwise verification was started and the row is returned as-is.

get.description: Return the account SMTP config (password redacted), or null.

put.description: Save or update the SMTP server settings for the account.

delete.description: Remove the account SMTP server config.

post.description: Connect to the SMTP server and verify credentials without sending mail.

get.description: Senders matching the active provider, with Oviond default first.

post.description: Add a sender tied to either the verified domain or the SMTP config.

get.description: Every configured sender row regardless of the active provider.

post.description: Enqueue a transactional email for asynchronous delivery via the active provider. Accepts a template_id+context shape or a free-form html shape. Returns the queue job id; query GET /logs for delivery state.

get.description: List media assets for the current account (paginated)

put.description: Move multiple media items to a folder

delete.description: Soft-delete a media item. The underlying file is retained in S3 for potential restore.
Soft-delete multiple media items.

get.description: List media folders for the current account.

post.description: Create a new media folder.

delete.description: Delete a media folder. Media items in the folder are not deleted.

get.description: List all unique tags across assets for the current account
List assets for the current account

schema.description: Comma-separated category names to filter by

post.description: Create a new asset
Duplicate an asset with a new name
Instantiate an asset's widgets onto a project page (connectivity-aware: unconnected sources land as demo).

get.description: List the widgets that belong to an asset
Get a single asset by ID

delete.description: Delete an asset

post.description: Enqueue a PDF generation job for a project.

get.description: Poll the status of a PDF generation job.
List PDF generation history for a project.

delete.description: Delete a PDF export record and its underlying S3 object.

get.description: List templates for the current account.

schema.description: standard = Oviond templates, mine = user templates

post.description: Create a new template, optionally copying pages and widgets from a project.

get.description: Get a single template by ID.

delete.description: Delete a template.
Delete multiple templates in a single request.

get.description: List themes for the current account.

post.description: Create a new theme.

get.description: Get a single theme by ID.

delete.description: Delete a theme.

get.description: List automations across all projects for the current account

post.description: Create a new automation for a project

get.description: Get execution history across every automation for a project

put.description: Update automation schedule and notification settings

delete.description: Soft-delete an automation and remove it from the cron scheduler
Soft-delete multiple automations and remove them from the cron scheduler

put.description: Pause an automation (removes the cron job but retains the config)
Resume a paused automation (re-registers the cron job)

post.description: Trigger a test execution of an automation

get.description: List archived items (paginated)
Archived item counts per type

delete.description: Permanently delete archived items

get.description: List activity logs for the current account

delete.description: Soft-delete many notifications in one call (each must belong to the current user)

post.description: Lightweight client-side gate: checks format and disposable-domain status. Does not reveal whether the email is registered.
